Untraceable (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,687,835Details
International Box Office $23,962,116
Worldwide Box Office $52,649,951
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,285,798
Total $20,285,798
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,354,069 (39.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,368 opening theaters/2,368 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $47,786,419

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 25th, 2008 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: May 13th, 2008 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for some prolonged sequences of strong gruesome violence, and language
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Crime, FBI, Internet, Mental Illness, Revenge, Serial Killer, Suicide, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Lakeshore Entertainment, Cohen Media Group, Pearl Studio
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
